name: Sinigang Na Bangus (Milkfish in Sour Broth)
recipeIngredient: 1.5 lb Bangus (milkfish) - or white fish, dressed
2 cups Green beans, cut diagonally in half
1 cup Spinach leaves (or cabbage, mustard greens or watercress)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the fish and cut into 4-6 pieces. Salt all over.
2. Bring water to a boil and add tamarind pods until they are tender. Remove the pods, mash them, strain back into the boiling water.
3. Add tomatoes, onions, and green beans to the boiling mixture. Cook for 15 minutes or until vegetables are almost cooked.
4. Add fish, banana hearts, and patis. Bring to a boil. Lower heat and simmer for 3-5 minutes.
5. Add spinach leaves and let stand for 5 minutes before serving. Serve with bagoong or patis (fish sauce).
